# CrawlDown Project

Go implementation of CrawlDown - a CLI tool for crawling websites and converting them to LLM-friendly markdown.

## Project Status
- [x] Directory structure created
- [x] Go modules initialized
- [x] Dependencies installed
- [x] Core packages implemented
- [x] CLI interface created
- [x] Go installed
- [x] Build successful
- [x] Binary tested and working
- [x] Documentation complete

## Production Ready ✅

The application is fully functional and ready for use.

## Quick Start

```bash
# Build
go build -o crawldown ./cmd/crawldown

# Run
./crawldown https://example.com --depth 3 --verbose
```

## Note

Python implementation archived at ../CrawlDown-Python-Archived/
